final_prompt.prompt:

Composition: must be diagonal composition
Subject: must include "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as the focal subjects
Scene/backdrop:

Color palette: needs high-contrast accent color direction — exact color values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must use diagonal composition; must apply high-contrast accent colors
Avoid:
